title: Substrate Scanning Engine: Geometric Parameter Generation for L-functions and Spectral Systems
description: A modular computational engine that extracts 29 deterministic spectral features from any system with a linear operator and discrete spectrum. Developed from the Riemann zeta function and validated on 16 domains with 12 application engines, 3 pipelines, and 17 interactive visualizations. The fundamental decomposition separates infrastructure (universal amplitude decay f(b) = b/(b+1)), signal (zero-specific phase tuning), and arithmetic structure (Canal A) as three orthogonal channels. Code: AGPL-3.0-or-later. Papers: CC-BY-4.0.
